response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive open-source contributions, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery sessions — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI or LLM system development
Missing clear experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment experience
